# Urban Cairn Tech Solution

> Software studio for ambitious operators across India. We build custom websites, business & WhatsApp automation, trading dashboards, and lead-generation systems — shipped in about 14 days. Udyam + GST registered MSME.

Urban Cairn Tech Solution is a technology-driven studio that helps startups, SMEs, and enterprises automate operations, improve efficiency, and grow revenue through modern, custom-built software. Founded and led by Rahulkumar (Founder & Principal Engineer). Work is strategy-first, ROI-driven, and fully owned by the client (100% code ownership). Based in Gujarat, India; works remotely with clients across India and globally.

## Services
- [High-Converting Websites](https://urbancairn.in/services): fast, premium marketing and product sites built to convert
- [Mobile App Development](https://urbancairn.in/services): native and cross-platform apps for iOS and Android
- [Business Automation](https://urbancairn.in/services): WhatsApp and workflow automation that removes manual work
- [Custom Software Development](https://urbancairn.in/services): bespoke internal tools, portals, and SaaS products
- [Trading Tools & Dashboards](https://urbancairn.in/trading-tools): live data dashboards, P&L tracking, signal scanners, backtest engines, and TradingView Pine Script indicators
- [Lead Generation Systems](https://urbancairn.in/services): funnels, lead engines, and CRM integrations that fill the pipeline

## Key pages
- [Home](https://urbancairn.in/): overview of the studio and what it builds
- [Services](https://urbancairn.in/services): full service catalogue
- [Portfolio](https://urbancairn.in/portfolio): selected projects and product mockups
- [Industries](https://urbancairn.in/industries): industry-specific solutions
- [Process](https://urbancairn.in/process): how projects are delivered (typical 14-day cycle)
- [Free Audit](https://urbancairn.in/free-audit): request a free website/automation audit
- [Contact](https://urbancairn.in/contact): start a project

## Why Urban Cairn
- 14-day average delivery
- 100% client code ownership
- Direct WhatsApp access to the engineer (no account-manager layer)
- Udyam (MSME) + GST registered business
- Business-focused: every feature maps to a revenue, cost, or efficiency outcome
